title: Waxed Copper Overhaul
description: Waxed Copper Overhaul add a new copper color WITHOUT REMOVING ANY VANILLA TEXTURE
body:
Waxed Copper Overhaul add a new copper color WITHOUT REMOVING ANY VANILLA TEXTUREOxidized Copper and Waxed Oxidized copper are almost the same block since the copper cannot age any further.
So instead of having duplicates of the same blocks .This ressource pack aim to add a new copper color while being compatible with vanilla minecraft , you can install this pack into your world and all of your builds will be same.

You will just need to scrap a few waxed copper block if you want to turn them teal again.Also double cut copper slab of all variant have a unique look to look like the original copper texture that was shown

The pack is already compatible with all the new copper blocks added in 1.21 so enjoy a wide variety of brassy coppers bulbs , grates , trapdoors and doors and more and I will update the pack if we get new coppers blocks in the future.
